import json
for name, path in [
  \('reuse', 'ad72f19f46b5d7f38'\),
  \('quality', 'a87e6c9ea5a50250f'\),
  \('efficiency', 'acf4f8c83468b0e95'\),
]:

    with open\(f'/private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-eddietovebeppearonelsa-Desktop-whohere-project--claude-worktrees-robust-chasing-fern/82c54544-8453-4984-80a0-b7b02ed5a44c/tasks/{path}.output'\) as f:
      data = json.load\(f\)
    msgs = [m for m in data.get\('messages', []\) if m.get\('role'\) == 'assistant']
    last = msgs[-1] if msgs else None
    if last:
      content = last['content']
      if isinstance\(content, list\):
        text = ' '.join\(c.get\('text',''\) for c in content if isinstance\(c,dict\)\)
      else:
        text = str\(content\)
      print\(f'=== {name} ==='\)
      print\(text[-2000:]\)
    else:
      print\(f'=== {name}: no assistant messages ==='\)
  except Exception as e:
    print\(f'=== {name}: error {e} ==='\)
")
